summary: dry-run path reuses liveFacts / liveImages from the pre-flight probe instead of re-probing the cache; correctly subtracts image cache hits from the forecasted live-call count.
reason: Previously the dry-run path made a redundant second probe of s.Get("coin", cert) AND added len(certs) (not len(certs)-imgHits) when --with-images was set. Forecasted live_calls was higher than the actual live path would make. Greptile P1 finding on PR #630 (review 3). Now reuses facts/liveFacts/imgHits/liveImages computed before the quota gate.
